case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. ESTELA A MANEJA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: COMPUTATION OF INTEREST & LACK OF ORIGINAL EXECUTED AGREEMENT [CCP 585] FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANEJA, ESTELA A $2,651.00 PRINCIPAL, $357.34 INTEREST, $240.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,248.34, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $240.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MANEJA, ESTELA A

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT MANEJA, ESTELA A DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-16-2009
AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
